title: FA_edition !1.21.4!
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/1XxTln2.png)

# FA_EDITION 
## By FA_pew

A pack that makes vanilla minecraft cooler!
It adds **Overlays**, **Colormaps**, **Lightmaps** and a lot of new **Textures** and **Models** that fit in the vanilla style of minecraft.

You can play with the dark gui version

### Hope you enjoy it

### [DISCORD INVITE LINK](https://discord.gg/kkgQnPdhZ4)

![OF Required](https://i.imgur.com/1Ieb9HR.png)
